ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_address" TEXT /* School address */,
  "school_city" TEXT /* School city */,
  "school_state" TEXT /* School state */,
  "school_zip" TEXT /* School zip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "division_description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the schools table */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the divisions table */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Coach's name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Player's name */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Player's position */,
  "player_years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Player's years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team's score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team's score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the games table */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  "points_for" REAL /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" REAL /* Points scored against the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player stat */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the games table */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "disciplinary_actions" INTEGER /* Number of disciplinary actions taken against the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, player, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-team association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the teams table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id")
)
